business.name: Acme Notes
business.one_liner: AI-powered meeting notes that turn calls into decisions and tasks.

icps.name: Series A startup operators
icps.pain: Lose follow-ups across Zoom, Slack, and docs.

icps.name: Mid-market RevOps leaders
icps.pain: CRM hygiene; reps don't log call notes.

value.problem: Meetings produce decisions and tasks that never make it back into the system of record.
value.promise: Every meeting ends with a shipped summary, decisions, and tasks in the right tool.
differentiators: Native bi-directional sync with Linear, Jira, Notion, HubSpot

challenges.acquisition: Hard to break through in a crowded notetaker category.
challenges.activation: ~40% of signups never connect a calendar.
challenges.referral: No referral loop in place yet.

goals_next_12_months: Build a defensible content moat in 'meeting → action' search intent
Activate a creator/partner program with 25 signed partners
constraints: No paid ads above $3k/month until CAC payback < 9 months proven
